title: Holts Car Shampoo And Wax 5L, Easy Rinse Car Wash Shampoo, Professional Quality Car Wash And Wax For Streak Free Cleaning, Protects & Shines, For Hand Or Pressure Wash, Dual Action Car Cleaning
features: CAR SHAMPOO AND WAX: Holts Car Cleaning Shampoo and Wax is tough on stubborn dirt including insects and bird residue. The advanced formula means it will be kind to your paintwork and leave your car beautifully clean with no streaks.

PROFESSIONAL CAR WASH: The Holts Shampoo and Wax is part of our Professional range which is available for drivers to use at home on their driveway either for hand washing or a pressure washer, so you can get a professional quality clean any time.

DUAL ACTION, PROTECT & SHINE: Our Car Wash includes Shampoo & Wax - so not only is it tough on stains, the additional wax provides a layer of protection for your car’s exterior, keeping it clean and shiny for longer.

PERFECT WASH AGAIN & AGAIN: This is a Car Cleaner Shampoo & Wax that you can rely on again and again. One five litre bottle will sustain you for over 300 washes, and you’ll get a professional-quality clean every single time.

OVER 100 YEARS OF EXCELLENCE: At Holts, we have spent over a century offering solutions to your car troubles to make your life easier and stress free. If you want the perfect tools to maintain, repair or clean your vehicle, we have what you need.
